prerequisites.value: Dazzling Display, Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike, Savage Slam, Weapon Focus, base attack bonus +9 or monk level 6th.

description.value: **Benefit:** While you are using Savage Slam, if you succeed at your grapple combat maneuver check to knock the opponent prone, you can spend a swift action to attempt an Intimidate check to demoralize foes within 30 feet who could see your attack.
